items.question: Which tcode creates a sales order?
items.rationale: VA01 = create; VA03 = display; VL01N = delivery; VF01 = billing.

items.question: Which table stores outbound delivery headers?
items.rationale: LIKP = delivery header; VBAK = order header; VBRK = billing header; BKPF = FI header.

items.question: Billing (VF01) creates an FI document.
items.rationale: Billing passes revenue to FI, creating BKPF/BSEG entries.

items.question: List the three core O2C transactions in order.
